title: AIREP profile: nist_ai_rmf v0.1
description: Maps an AIREP record onto the NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI 100-1). INDICATIVE: function/category references are a design aid to be checked against the primary source — AIREP produces evidence for the MEASURE and MANAGE functions (which decision, on what evidence, under which gate, with what scope; and the response taken), it does not by itself establish a risk-management programme. Attaches under profiles.nist_ai_rmf, never changes the core, carries no personal data.

function.description: The NIST AI RMF function this record bears on.

category.description: The subcategory identifier, for example 'MEASURE-2.7' or 'MANAGE-4.1'.

trustworthiness.description: The NIST trustworthiness characteristics this record bears on.

measurement.description: For the MEASURE function: the metric assessed and its result.

result.description: Carried as a string so two implementations agree on the bytes (SPEC §6).

management_action.description: For the MANAGE function: the response taken.
